description: Creating mechanistic causal chain diagram for autoimmune gastritis
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(16, 12))
ax.set_xlim(0, 20)
ax.set_ylim(0, 16)
ax.axis('off')

# Title
ax.text(10, 15.5, 'Mechanistic Causal Chain: Autoimmune Gastritis via H+/K+ ATPase',
        ha='center', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

# Color scheme
strong = '#28a745'   # Strong evidence
moderate = '#ffc107'  # Moderate evidence  
weak = '#dc3545'     # Weak/missing link
box_color = '#e9ecef'

def draw_box(x, y, w, h, text, evidence_level='strong', fontsize=8):
    colors = {'strong': '#d4edda', 'moderate': '#fff3cd', 'weak': '#f8d7da', 'neutral': '#e2e3e5'}
    border = {'strong': strong, 'moderate': moderate, 'weak': weak, 'neutral': '#6c757d'}
    rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((x, y), w, h, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", 
                                     facecolor=colors[evidence_level], edgecolor=border[evidence_level], linewidth=2)
    ax.add_patch(rect)
    ax.text(x + w/2, y + h/2, text, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=fontsize, wrap=True)

def draw_arrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, label='', color='black'):
    ax.annotate('', xy=(x2, y2), xytext=(x1, y1),
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color=color, lw=1.5))
    if label:
        mx, my = (x1+x2)/2, (y1+y2)/2
        ax.text(mx+0.1, my, label, fontsize=7, color=color, style='italic')

# UPSTREAM TRIGGERS (Row 1)
ax.text(10, 14.5, 'UPSTREAM TRIGGERS', ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#495057')

draw_box(0.5, 13, 3.5, 1.2, 'Genetic susceptibility\n(PTPN22, HLA-DR4,\nCTLA4)', 'strong', 7)
draw_box(5, 13, 3.5, 1.2, 'Monogenic defects\n(AIRE/APECED,\nFOXP3/IPEX)', 'strong', 7)
draw_box(9.5, 13, 3.5, 1.2, 'Neonatal viral\ninfection\n(roseolovirus)', 'moderate', 7)
draw_box(14, 13, 3.5, 1.2, 'H. pylori\nmolecular mimicry\n(cross-reactive T cells)', 'strong', 7)

# TOLERANCE BREAKDOWN (Row 2)
ax.text(10, 12, 'TOLERANCE BREAKDOWN', ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#495057')

draw_box(1.5, 10.5, 4, 1.2, 'Central tolerance failure\n• ATP4B absent from thymus\n• Alpha expression non-functional\n• AIRE-dependent TRA loss', 'strong', 7)
draw_box(7, 10.5, 4, 1.2, 'Peripheral tolerance failure\n• Treg depletion/dysfunction\n• Checkpoint loss (PD-1)\n• CTLA-4 polymorphisms', 'strong', 7)
draw_box(13, 10.5, 4, 1.2, 'Peripheral cross-activation\n• H. pylori mimicry epitopes\n• 9 cross-reactive proteins\n• CD4 Th1 cells', 'strong', 7)

# Arrows from triggers to tolerance
draw_arrow(2.5, 13, 3.5, 11.7)
draw_arrow(6.75, 13, 5.5, 11.7)
draw_arrow(11.25, 13, 5.5, 11.7)
draw_arrow(11.25, 13, 9, 11.7)
draw_arrow(15.75, 13, 15, 11.7)

# EFFECTOR MECHANISM (Row 3)
ax.text(10, 9.5, 'EFFECTOR MECHANISM', ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#495057')

draw_box(3, 8, 5, 1.2, 'Autoreactive CD4+ T cells\nrecognize H+/K+ ATPase\n(alpha: 630-641; beta: 261-274)', 'strong', 7)
draw_box(10, 8, 5, 1.2, 'Multiple effector pathways:\n• Th1 (IFN-γ) → lymphocytic\n• Th17 (IL-17) → eosinophilic/destructive\n• Th2 (IL-4) → eosinophilic', 'strong', 7)

draw_arrow(5.5, 10.5, 5.5, 9.2)
draw_arrow(9, 10.5, 5.5, 9.2)
draw_arrow(15, 10.5, 12.5, 9.2)
draw_arrow(8, 8.6, 10, 8.6)

# TISSUE DAMAGE (Row 4)
ax.text(10, 7, 'TISSUE DAMAGE', ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#495057')

draw_box(3, 5.5, 5, 1.2, 'Parietal cell destruction\n• Direct T-cell cytotoxicity\n• Cytokine-mediated damage\n• Autoantibody (APCA)', 'strong', 7)
draw_box(10, 5.5, 5, 1.2, 'Autoantibody production\n• Anti-ATP4A/ATP4B (PCA)\n• Anti-intrinsic factor\n• Epitope spreading', 'strong', 7)

draw_arrow(5.5, 8, 5.5, 6.7)
draw_arrow(12.5, 8, 12.5, 6.7)

# CLINICAL MANIFESTATION (Row 5)
ax.text(10, 4.5, 'CLINICAL MANIFESTATIONS', ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#495057')

draw_box(0.5, 3, 3.5, 1.2, 'Achlorhydria\n→ Hypergastrinemia\n→ ECL hyperplasia', 'strong', 7)
draw_box(5, 3, 3.5, 1.2, 'Iron deficiency\nanemia\n(precedes B12 def)', 'strong', 7)
draw_box(9.5, 3, 3.5, 1.2, 'Pernicious anemia\n(B12 deficiency)\n→ Megaloblastic', 'strong', 7)
draw_box(14, 3, 3.5, 1.2, 'Gastric neoplasms\n• Type 1 NETs\n• Adenocarcinoma risk', 'moderate', 7)

draw_arrow(5.5, 5.5, 2.5, 4.2)
draw_arrow(5.5, 5.5, 6.75, 4.2)
draw_arrow(12.5, 5.5, 11.25, 4.2)
draw_arrow(12.5, 5.5, 15.75, 4.2)

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#d4edda', edgecolor=strong, label='Strong evidence'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#fff3cd', edgecolor=moderate, label='Moderate evidence'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#f8d7da', edgecolor=weak, label='Weak/missing link'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower center', ncol=3, fontsize=9, 
          framealpha=0.9, bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.02))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('causal_chain.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Causal chain diagram saved.")
